title: 6th Birthday Balloons - 20 Pcs 12'' Multicoloured Latex Balloons for Girls & Boys - Number 6 & Age 6 Decorations
features: 10 Bright Colors with 360° Printing: 6th birthday balloons come in 10 bright colors with number and star prints. Whether boy or girl, man or woman, young or old, our balloons provide the right atmosphere

20 Pcs Premium Balloons: 6th birthday decorations come in variegated, trendy (assorted) colors: red, dark blue, light green, silver, dark purple, dark green, yellow, light pink, orange, light blue. Our latex balloons are thickened and durable, a good choice for those who value quality
Easy to Use: 20 pcs number 6 latex balloons can be inflated with air or helium without any skill. Decorating your party is easy and convenient

Excellent Party Decorations: These multi-color number birthday balloons are printed with the number 6, beautiful and stylish, suitable as festive decorations for 6th birthday/anniversary party, the beautiful design prints are sure to impress your relatives and friends
Warm Reminder: Do not over-inflate the 6th bithday balloon, 80%-90% is enough. Please avoid exposing the number 6 balloon to direct sunlight, sharp objects and excessive friction
